title: SCP-127, The Living Gun
description: A living firearm that reloads itself with teeth.
body:
The Living Gun adds a new weapon. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-127, also known as The Living Gun.


SCP-127 appears as an ordinary firearm but is in fact organic and alive. It can be found lying on the ground and picked up by right-clicking. The gun has two firing modes: semi-automatic and full-automatic, and regenerates its own ammunition over time. The bullets are formed from biological material, most notably teeth, giving it a disturbing origin. Though its damage is modest, its knockback and self-reloading ability make it a unique and unsettling weapon. 

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-127 spawn?

SCP-127 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-127.
</details>



![SCP-127](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f2b0ae02970d434219bad5992bff7cd98410d54.png)

SCP-127 looks like a normal weapon and can be found laying on the ground. If a player right-clicks SCP-127, he will pick it up. When held, right-clicking fires projectiles depending on its current mode. Semi automatic shoots only one teeth. Full automatic shoots multiple teeths, but a player needs to hold right-click on this mode. Holding sneak while right-clicking switches between modes with an unsettling sound from the SCP itself, while sneaking and right-clicking on a block places it down again. The weapon holds up to 60 shots and regenerates its ammunition after one minute once empty. Its projectiles causes low damage but a bit of knockback.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
